# Randolph Construction

> A locally-owned construction contractor based in Wadsworth, Ohio, providing landscaping, hardscaping, custom composite decks, and concrete services for homeowners across Northeast Ohio. Built strong, built to last.

## Quick facts

- Phone: (330) 400-6338
- Email: bmrandolph1111@gmail.com
- Based in: Wadsworth, Ohio
- Founded: 2023
- One crew handles every project from start to finish — landscaping, hardscaping, decks, and concrete.

## Services

- [Landscaping](https://randolph.construction/services#landscaping): Lawn care, full landscape design, and seasonal maintenance for homes across Wadsworth and Medina County.
- [Hardscaping & Outdoor Spaces](https://randolph.construction/services#hardscaping): Unilock pavers, retaining walls, fire pit areas, and outdoor living spaces built to outlast Northeast Ohio winters.
- [Custom Composite Decks](https://randolph.construction/services#decks): Premium composite decks designed and built around how you actually live outside — resist warping, fading, and wear.
- [Concrete Services](https://randolph.construction/services#concrete): Driveways, sidewalks, pads, and patios — clean, level, and built to last. Prep, pour, and finish handled in full.

## Service area

Wadsworth and the surrounding Northeast Ohio communities:

- [Medina, OH](https://randolph.construction/service-area/medina) — Medina County
- [Norton, OH](https://randolph.construction/service-area/norton) — Summit County
- [Barberton, OH](https://randolph.construction/service-area/barberton) — Summit County
- [Rittman, OH](https://randolph.construction/service-area/rittman) — Wayne County
- [Doylestown, OH](https://randolph.construction/service-area/doylestown) — Wayne County

## Why homeowners hire Randolph Construction

- Built on hard work, not hype.
- Premium materials (Unilock hardscapes, composite decking), no corners cut.
- One crew, all the skills — no juggling multiple contractors.
- Clean work, clear communication, finished on time.
